LSE-HS9-L2-10001300-HSELA910-FFR-NAV-01 • HS English 9-10 • Citing Textual Evidence for Inferential Analysis

The Songs and the Stories

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What purpose does the girl have in stating both ideas out loud? Explain the reason behind her thinking.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.9-10.1  |  HS English 9-10: Citing Textual Evidence for Inferential Analysis
